prompt: Change the default web browser. System Settings > Desktop & Dock > Default web browser > pick a different one (e.g. switch from Safari to Chrome or vice versa). Fast path: install `defaultbrowser` brew formula then `defaultbrowser chrome`/`defaultbrowser safari`. The eval reads the LaunchServices http handler via `plutil -p ~/Library/Preferences/com.apple.LaunchServices/com.apple.launchservices.secure.plist` and expects the http/https handler to differ from setup.
